headline: Dirty SOX
summary: The 30 semiconductor stocks in the Philadelphia SOX Index were up an average of 73% year-to-date through 5/11/26. Read more here.

headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on Analog Devices, Raises Price Target to $450
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Rick Schafer   maintains Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $400 to $450.
